zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Mallory Lord of Swinford於1217年出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾時，他的父親William Mallory26歲，母親Margaret25歲。他於1243年與Catherine Nunwich在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾沃爾頓結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1259年在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾沃爾頓享年42歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard Mallory Lord of Swinford于1217年出生在英国英格兰斯塔福爾时，他的父亲William Mallory26岁，母亲Margaret25岁。他于1243年与Catherine Nunwich在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾沃爾頓结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1259年在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾沃爾頓享年42岁。

nameMeanings.name: Mallory
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): nickname for an unfortunate person, from Old French maloret, maloré, maleuré ‘ill-fortuned, unlucky’.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Mallory Lord of Swinford was born in 1217, in Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William Mallory, was 26 and his mother, Margaret, was 25. He married Catherine Nunwich in 1243, in Walton, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died in 1259, in Walton, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 42.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard Mallory Lord of Swinford est né en 1217, à Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Mallory, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Margaret, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Catherine Nunwich en 1243, à Walton, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé en 1259, à Walton, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 42 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard Mallory Lord of Swinfordが1217年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアで生まれた時，父William Malloryは26歳，母Margaretは25歳であった。1243年にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアワルトンでCatherine Nunwichと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1259年にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアワルトンで42歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Mallory Lord of Swinford(이)가 1217년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Mallory(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1243년 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 월턴에서 Catherine Nunwich(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1259년 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 월턴에서 42세의 나이로 사망했다.

Он женился на женщине по имени Catherine Nunwich в 1243 г. в местности валтон, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер в 1259 г. в местности валтон, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 42 лет.
